time_window_policy: same retained window for both endpoint surfaces and all derived metrics
pressure_basis_policy: static, p_rgh, hydrostatic, kinetic, density, and local dynamic-pressure terms explicit
component_isolation_policy: same-basis straight reference must yield unclipped nonnegative K_local or row remains apparent_cluster_only
staged_copy_root_policy: task-owned tmp path declared by future sampler
admission_policy: raw rows alone are never admission; later gate-review package must pass all gates
guardrail: no endpoint-pressure invention; no K clipping; no hidden global multiplier; no F6 fit
